title: selliguea sri-ratu
intro: Selliguea sri-ratu, also known as Pilea geayi or Sri Ratu, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Selliguea sri-ratu include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Selliguea sri-ratu is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
